name: IT Support Specialist
role: Experienced in configuring and managing Active Directory environments, implementing secure network infrastructure, and supporting enterprise desktop systems.
AboutDescription: Currently, I am working as an IT Executive at,

, where I manage enterprise IT operations including Active Directory administration, user management, network configuration, and system troubleshooting. I handle infrastructure support and ensure smooth day-to-day IT operations.
Previously, I worked as a Junior Programmer at
For 1.5 years, where I was involved in application development, debugging, and deployment support. This experience strengthened my logical thinking and problem-solving abilities.

I specialize in Active Directory configuration, router and switch setup, LAN/WAN troubleshooting, Windows Server administration, and Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace configuration. My goal is to build a strong career in System Administration, Networking, and Cloud Infrastructure.

college.name: kumararani meena muthiah college of arts and science
college.description: Established in 1996, the college is known for its excellence in Arts, Science, and Technology education. Accredited with an A Grade and supported by experienced faculty, it provides a strong academic foundation for student growth. I completed my BCA degree here in 2021.
